quests.name: Daily Frontier Slayer: Tide Crabs
quests.description: The Shrouded Isle shore crawls with tide crabs. Clear the beach.

quests.name: Daily Frontier Slayer: Drowned Sailors
quests.description: Drowned sailors haunt the wreck. Put the dead to rest.

quests.name: Daily Frontier Slayer: Frost Imps
quests.description: Frost imps swarm the Frozen Peaks foothills. Scatter them.

quests.name: Daily Frontier Slayer: Ice Elementals
quests.description: Ice elementals gather on the glacier. Shatter them.

quests.name: Daily Frontier Slayer: Frost Giants
quests.description: Frost giants stalk the high ridge. Bring them low.
